name: PeerTube
description: Federated video platform over ActivityPub — YouTube-alternative on the fediverse. Upload and transcode video, federate channels, stream via WebTorrent or HLS. Heaviest bundle in the federated line — S3 storage + aggressive transcoding policy are load-bearing, not optional.
author: Crow

install_consent_messages.en: PeerTube joins the public fediverse over ActivityPub — your instance becomes publicly addressable at the domain you configure, any video you publish can be replicated to federated servers and cached there; replicated content cannot be fully recalled. Video storage is unbounded without S3 + scheduled pruning: a single 1080p30 video is 500MB+ in transcoded variants, and federated caches of remote channels can add hundreds of GB within months. Video transcoding spikes RAM to 3-5 GB PER concurrent upload (ffmpeg on x264). PeerTube is hardware-gated: REFUSED on hosts with <16 GB total RAM and <500 GB disk; warned below 32 GB / 2 TB. If transcoding + S3 both disabled, webtorrent seeding is your only scaling lever — the instance becomes unfeasible past ~100 videos. Hosting copyrighted video (music, films, clips you don't have rights to) is a legal fast-track to defederation and takedown notices. DMCA + equivalent requests are your legal responsibility.
install_consent_messages.es: PeerTube se une al fediverso público vía ActivityPub — tu instancia será direccionable en el dominio que configures, cualquier video publicado puede replicarse a servidores federados y cachearse allí; el contenido replicado no puede recuperarse completamente. El almacenamiento de video es ilimitado sin S3 + recorte programado: un solo video 1080p30 son 500MB+ en variantes transcodificadas, y los cachés federados de canales remotos pueden añadir cientos de GB en meses. La transcodificación de video eleva la RAM a 3-5 GB POR subida concurrente (ffmpeg x264). PeerTube está limitado por hardware: RECHAZADO en hosts con <16 GB de RAM total y <500 GB de disco; advierte bajo 32 GB / 2 TB. Si transcodificación + S3 están deshabilitados, el seeding webtorrent es tu única palanca de escala — la instancia se vuelve inviable pasados ~100 videos. Hospedar video con copyright (música, películas, clips sin derechos) es un camino directo a la defederación y avisos DMCA. Solicitudes DMCA + equivalentes son tu responsabilidad legal.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_WEBSERVER_HOSTNAME
env_vars.description: Public domain (subdomain; IMMUTABLE after first federation). Appears in video URLs, channel URLs, every ActivityPub actor.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_DB_PASSWORD
env_vars.description: Password for the bundled Postgres role.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_SECRET
env_vars.description: Server secret (32+ random chars). Signs federation requests; IMMUTABLE — rotation requires re-announcing every federated actor.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_ACCESS_TOKEN
env_vars.description: OAuth bearer token (Administration → Users → your account → Personal Access Tokens, OR POST /api/v1/users/token with username+password + client_id+client_secret from /api/v1/oauth-clients/local).

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_URL
env_vars.description: Internal URL the MCP server uses to reach PeerTube (default http://peertube:9000 over crow-federation).

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_ADMIN_EMAIL
env_vars.description: Admin email — where takedown notices, abuse reports, and federation alerts go.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_TRANSCODING_THREADS
env_vars.description: Worker threads per concurrent transcode (default 0 = all CPUs). Lower on multi-tenant hosts to keep latency under control.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_TRANSCODING_CONCURRENCY
env_vars.description: Max simultaneous transcodes. 1-2 on 16 GB hosts; 4+ on 32 GB+.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_SIGNUP_ENABLED
env_vars.description: Allow new user signups (true/false). Default false; opening signup without moderation tooling invites abuse.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_VIDEO_QUOTA_MB
env_vars.description: Default per-user video quota in MB. 10 GB default (10000).

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_MEDIA_RETENTION_DAYS
env_vars.description: Remote video cache retention in days (default 14; 7 on smaller hosts).

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_S3_ENDPOINT
env_vars.description: Optional S3-compatible endpoint for video storage. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED on active instances. When set with bucket/access/secret, scripts/configure-storage.mjs routes via storage-translators.peertube() (PEERTUBE_OBJECT_STORAGE_* envelope).

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_S3_BUCKET
env_vars.description: S3 bucket for video originals + transcoded variants + streaming playlists.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_S3_ACCESS_KEY
env_vars.description: S3 access key.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_S3_SECRET_KEY
env_vars.description: S3 secret key.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_S3_REGION
env_vars.description: S3 region.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_SMTP_HOSTNAME
env_vars.description: Outbound SMTP (registration confirmation, takedown receipts).

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_SMTP_PORT
env_vars.description: SMTP port.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_SMTP_USERNAME
env_vars.description: SMTP username.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_SMTP_PASSWORD
env_vars.description: SMTP password.

env_vars.name: PEERTUBE_SMTP_FROM
env_vars.description: From address.

notes: Three containers (peertube + postgres + redis). chocobozzz/peertube:production-bookworm image. Expose via caddy_add_federation_site { domain: PEERTUBE_WEBSERVER_HOSTNAME, upstream: 'peertube:9000', profile: 'activitypub-peertube' } — the peertube profile also wires WebSocket upgrade on /socket.io and large request-body limits for video upload chunking. Admin credentials: first-boot logs print a randomly-generated admin password (search `docker logs crow-peertube | grep -A1 "Username"`); rotate via `docker exec -it crow-peertube npm run reset-password -- -u root` immediately.
